CREATE TABLE Demo.Demo.Customers (CompanyName VARCHAR(255), ContactName VARCHAR(255));
INSERT INTO Demo.Demo.Customers (CompanyName, ContactName) VALUES ('Alfreds Futterkiste', 'Maria Anders');
INSERT INTO Demo.Demo.Customers (CompanyName, ContactName) VALUES ('Ana Trujillo Emparedados y helados', 'Ana Trujillo');
INSERT INTO Demo.Demo.Customers (CompanyName, ContactName) VALUES ('Antonio Moreno Taquería', 'Antonio Moreno');
INSERT INTO Demo.Demo.Customers (CompanyName, ContactName) VALUES ('Around the Horn', 'Thomas Hardy');
INSERT INTO Demo.Demo.Customers (CompanyName, ContactName) VALUES ('B\'s Beverages', 'Victoria Ashworth');
SELECT CompanyName, ContactName FROM Demo.Demo.Customers WHERE CompanyName BETWEEN 'A' AND 'B';
SELECT CompanyName, ContactName FROM Demo.Demo.Customers WHERE CompanyName IN (SELECT CompanyName FROM Demo.Demo.Customers WHERE ContactName LIKE '%An%');
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM Demo.Demo.Customers WHERE CompanyName IS NOT NULL;
SELECT a.CompanyName, b.ContactName FROM Demo.Demo.Customers a JOIN Demo.Demo.Customers b ON a.CompanyName = b.CompanyName WHERE a.ContactName <> b.ContactName;
CREATE TABLE Demo.Demo.Products (ProductID INT, ProductName VARCHAR(255), CompanyName VARCHAR(255));
INSERT INTO Demo.Demo.Products (ProductID, ProductName, CompanyName) VALUES (1, 'Chai', 'Alfreds Futterkiste');
INSERT INTO Demo.Demo.Products (ProductID, ProductName, CompanyName) VALUES (2, 'Chang', 'Ana Trujillo Emparedados y helados');
SELECT c.CompanyName, p.ProductName FROM Demo.Demo.Customers c LEFT JOIN Demo.Demo.Products p ON c.CompanyName = p.CompanyName;
SELECT p.ProductName, COUNT(*) FROM Demo.Demo.Products p WHERE p.CompanyName IN (SELECT CompanyName FROM Demo.Demo.Customers WHERE ContactName LIKE '%Al%') GROUP BY p.ProductName HAVING COUNT(*) > 1;
SELECT DISTINCT CompanyName FROM Demo.Demo.Customers WHERE CompanyName NOT LIKE '%a%';
CREATE FUNCTION Demo.Demo.SampleFunction (input VARCHAR) RETURNS VARCHAR AS 'return concat(input, ''-processed'');'
SELECT SampleFunction(CompanyName) FROM Demo.Demo.Customers;

CREATE PROCEDURE test_rexecute_max_results (IN remote_dsn VARCHAR, IN max_results INT) BEGIN DECLARE stmt VARCHAR; DECLARE res_vec_out, param_vec ANY; DECLARE sql_state, err_msg VARCHAR; DECLARE inx INTEGER; DECLARE num_cols_out INTEGER; SET stmt = 'SELECT CompanyName FROM Demo.Demo.Customers'; SET sql_state = '00000'; SET param_vec = vector(); CALL rexecute(remote_dsn, stmt, sql_state, err_msg, param_vec, num_cols_out, res_vec_out, NULL); SET inx = 0; WHILE inx < LEAST(max_results, LENGTH(res_vec_out)) DO RESULT(AREF(res_vec_out, inx)); SET inx = inx + 1; END WHILE; END;
EXECUTE test_rexecute_max_results('Local Virtuoso Demo', 3);
